title: Linux alert received
message: INC-2026-00425 reports Linux server high CPU / load average on RPT-LNX-017.

payload.alert_type: Linux server high CPU / load average
payload.current_state: Load average is 18.6 on an 8-vCPU host; report-renderer is consuming 92% CPU.
payload.requested_outcome: Stabilize load by restarting the approved service only.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Identify top process, avoid host reboot first, restart only approved service, and validate load recovery.

payload.title: Linux High Load Service Stabilization
controls: Identify top CPU process before action.
Do not reboot host as first response.
Validate load average and service health.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.

items.summary: Restarted approved renderer service after top-process check.
Validated load and service health after restart.
Engineer rebooted host before identifying top process.
items.notes: Unsafe precedent: unrelated batch jobs were interrupted.

items.summary: Service restart did not reduce load due to runaway job queue.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history rebooted the host first; SOP requires process identification and service-scoped action.

blocked_precedent.summary: Engineer rebooted host before identifying top process.
blocked_precedent.notes: Unsafe precedent: unrelated batch jobs were interrupted.

title: Evidence summary structured
message: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Linux server high CPU / load average.

payload.outcome: Proceed with SOP-governed mock remediation for Linux server high CPU / load average.
sop_controls: Identify top CPU process before action.
Do not reboot host as first response.
Validate load average and service health.
payload.governance_note: SOP beats history: HIST-LNX-2026-009 is visible as a warning, not copied into the remediation plan.

title: Safe remediation plan generated
message: Restart the approved report-renderer service in mock mode after top-process confirmation.

payload.summary: Restart the approved report-renderer service in mock mode after top-process confirmation.
payload.action_preview: Mock action: capture top output, drain active jobs, restart report-renderer.service, validate health.
payload.estimated_effect: Load average drops from 18.6 to 3.1 and CPU utilization drops below 45%.
safeguards: Human approval is required before remediation.
SOP controls override unsafe historical precedent.
validation_steps: Confirm report-renderer is the top CPU process.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate to application team if load rebounds above 10 within 15 minutes.

title: Policy gate passed with approval hold
message: Policy allows planning but requires human approval before mock execution.

checks.name: Target scope
checks.message: Targets are limited to approved scenario resources.

checks.name: Dry-run guard
checks.message: Plan uses a dry-run or mock-only action preview.

checks.name: Human approval
checks.message: Human approval is required before remediation.

validation_steps: Confirm report-renderer is the top CPU process.

checks.name: Mock-only execution

title: Approval package structured
message: Approve mock-only remediation for Linux server high CPU / load average.

payload.operator_message: Approve mock-only remediation for Linux server high CPU / load average.
payload.expected_safe_effect: Load average drops from 18.6 to 3.1 and CPU utilization drops below 45%.

title: Human approval required
message: Operator review is required before mock remediation can continue.

payload.side_effects: Replay mode disables approval side effects.

title: Mock remediation executed
message: Mock service restart reduced Linux load and preserved host availability.

title: Scenario validation passed
message: Load average recovered from 18.6 to 3.1 and service health is green.

payload.name: Scenario validation
payload.message: Load average recovered from 18.6 to 3.1 and service health is green.

title: RCA and audit evidence generated
message: Report renderer process saturated CPU after a stuck rendering batch.

payload.root_cause: Report renderer process saturated CPU after a stuck rendering batch.
payload.validation: Load average recovered from 18.6 to 3.1 and service health is green.
payload.business_impact: Reporting Platform remained protected during the synthetic workflow.

title: Closure decision required
message: Remediation is validated. Operator can close the incident now or keep it under observation before closure.

options.label: Approve closure
options.message: Close the incident with RCA and audit evidence attached.

options.label: Observe first
options.message: Keep the incident under observation, recheck metrics, then close.

title: Incident closed
message: INC-2026-00425 was closed with RCA, evidence, and validation attached.
